name: 3 LINK KIDS
description: In 3 Link, your goal is to remove all the images from the board by connecting 3 identical images. Connect lovely images of cute animals, delicious food, amazing places, and so much more. NOTE! You need to remove all the tiles before the time is up! So warm up your fingers, and it’s game on!
instructions: remove all the images from the board by connecting 3 identical images
tags: Barbie, Boy, Boys, Candy, Girl, Girls, Kids, Mario
